com.mentor.chs.api

Class IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
      • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
        • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext
  • Enclosing interface:
    IXGraphicConversions

    public static class IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext
extends IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
    Class which needs to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram for a specific dimension. Default values are filled and user can fill the values for which he need a change.

    Presently, IXPackagerContext#getDiagramGraphics(java.io.OutputStream, XBaseContext, IXDiagram) is the only API that makes use of this.

      Parameters to specify the height and width of the PNG.
